title: Little Miss Big
writer: Erna Lazarus, Harry Poppe, Chester Beecroft
actors: Beverly Simmons, Fay Holden, Frank McHugh
plot: Mary Jane Baxter (Fay Holden), a wealthy woman has named her cocker spaniel as her heir, in order to thwart scheming relatives. In learning of her action, her nephew, Eddie Martin (Frederick Brady as Fred Brady) institutes sanity ...
